query:
UPDATE trees SET
                tree_cluster_id = $2,
                sensor_id = $3,
                planting_year = $4,
                species = $5,
                number = $6,
                description = $7,
                watering_status = $8,
                last_watered = $9,
                latitude = $10,
                longitude = $11,
                geometry = ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint($11, $10), 4326),
                provider = $12,
                additional_informations = $13
            WHERE id = $1
